domain.name: Learning Management
domain.description: Course authoring, content delivery, compliance training, certifications, and learning paths for employees and extended audiences.
domain.catalog_tagline: Train your whole workforce and prove it, from first enrollment to audit-ready completion records.
domain.catalog_description: Run corporate learning end to end. Author and publish courses, deliver them online or in the classroom, and track every enrollment through to completion. Issue the certifications and badges that show who is qualified, and keep the evidence auditors and regulators ask for. Assign mandatory training automatically, chase overdue learners without manual follow-up, and feed completion signals to the HR, compliance, and identity systems that depend on them.

modules.name: Learning Automation
modules.description: Horizontal automation surface across LMS deployment: dynamic audience segments, automated training assignment rules, reusable notification templates, learner notification log, manager-directed nudges for overdue training, and escalation policies. Cuts across LMS-COURSE-DELIVERY, LMS-COMPLIANCE-TRAINING, LMS-PATHS, and LMS-CREDENTIALS.

modules.name: Compliance Training
modules.description: Mandatory regulatory training assignment, tracking, and certification: sexual harassment training (CA SB-1343), HIPAA, OSHA, anti-bribery, SOX, GDPR, AML. Masters `compliance_assignments` and `learner_certifications`. Realizes COMPLIANCE-TRAIN and CERT-MGMT. Distinct from general LMS course delivery: assignments are mandatory and time-bound, lifecycle includes `overdue`/`waived`/`expired` states with regulator-evidence retention, and ownership typically sits with GRC/Compliance, not L&D.

modules.name: Course Delivery
modules.description: The core LMS workflow: course authoring, content delivery, enrollment, completion tracking, and transcript posting. Masters `courses`, `course_enrollments`, `learning_records`. Realizes COURSE-AUTHOR and CONTENT-DELIVERY capabilities. The backbone module every LMS deployment installs first; the other LMS modules embedded_master courses to reference content.

modules.name: Credentials, Badges and Continuing Education
modules.description: Catalog and lifecycle for certifications, micro-credential badges, and continuing-education credits. Masters learner_certifications (re-mastered from LMS-COMPLIANCE-TRAINING) since professional development, FINRA CE, internal product certifications, and Open-Badges micro-credentials all live here, not just compliance training. Compliance training embeds learner_certifications for the regulated-training certification workflow.

modules.name: Learner Data Privacy
modules.description: Learner data privacy substrate that compliance training depends on: GDPR Article 6/7 consent capture, Article 15 subject access requests, and Article 17 right-to-erasure processing for training data. Carved out from LMS-COMPLIANCE-TRAINING because privacy obligations apply across the LMS even where statutory training is out of scope.

modules.name: Instructor-Led and Virtual-Instructor-Led Training
modules.description: Scheduled course delivery: offerings and sessions, instructor assignments, attendance capture (OSHA evidence substrate), waitlist management, virtual-classroom integration, and per-session resources. Structurally distinct from evergreen e-learning in LMS-COURSE-DELIVERY because it carries its own cardinality (course -> many offerings -> many sessions), its own roles (instructors are not learners), and its own per-session compliance footprint.

modules.name: Learning Paths
modules.description: Authors and assigns sequenced learning paths inside the LMS. Masters learning_paths; consumes skill_profiles (mastered by SKILLS-MGMT after migration) to recommend paths against skill gaps.

data_objects.name: assessment_attempts
data_objects.description: Per-learner per-attempt audit row: start time, score, pass/fail, time-on-task. FINRA / Part 11 evidence substrate.

data_objects.name: assessment_questions
data_objects.description: Item-bank entry: question stem, choices, scoring, and metadata for randomization.

data_objects.name: audiences
data_objects.description: Dynamic learner segment defined by attributes (department, location, role) and used by auto-enrollment and notification rules.

data_objects.name: automated_enrollment_rules
data_objects.description: Rule engine entry that auto-enrols learners into courses or paths based on audience membership and lifecycle events.

data_objects.name: certificate_templates
data_objects.description: PDF / image template used to issue a certificate to a learner; carries layout and dynamic fields.

data_objects.name: certification_definitions
data_objects.description: Catalog of certification types: name, issuing authority, validity period, recertification policy, prerequisite courses.

data_objects.name: certification_renewals
data_objects.description: Renewal cycle of an existing certification, distinct from initial issuance.

data_objects.name: ceu_records
data_objects.description: Earned-credit ledger row per learner; CEU evidence for state-CE, NASBA, and similar professional licensure reporting.

data_objects.name: cmi5_assignable_units
data_objects.description: cmi5 (ADL) assignable unit launched against an LRS; modern course-package standard supplanting SCORM.

data_objects.name: compliance_assignments
data_objects.description: Mandatory training assignment tied to a regulation, role, location, or hire-event (anti-harassment, AML, GDPR, OSHA, HIPAA). Carries due date, escalation policy, audit log.

data_objects.name: compliance_audit_records
data_objects.description: Regulator-facing audit trail row capturing who did what training when, with version and evidence reference. Distinct from learning_records: audit-purpose subset, retention-locked.

data_objects.name: compliance_regulations
data_objects.description: Tenant-scoped reference table of statutes a tenant is subject to (jurisdiction, citation, retention period). Each tenant activates only its applicable subset; the regulation field on training_evidence_records is an FK into this table, and the active rows gate which compliance evidence applies.

data_objects.name: compliance_training_campaigns
data_objects.description: Campaign container that bundles assignments by audience and due-date: annual code-of-conduct cycle, harassment refresh, security awareness wave.

data_objects.name: continuing_education_credits
data_objects.description: CEU credit-value master: credit hours, accrediting body, eligible courses.

data_objects.name: course_assessments
data_objects.description: Quiz or exam definition associated with a course or lesson; carries passing score and attempt policy.

data_objects.name: course_catalogs
data_objects.description: Scoped catalog view: subset of courses surfaced to a specific audience, branch, or domain.

data_objects.name: course_categories
data_objects.description: Hierarchical taxonomy for catalog browsing and reporting.

data_objects.name: course_completions
data_objects.description: Terminal completion record per learner per course version. Distinct from learning_records (event log).

data_objects.name: course_discussions
data_objects.description: Forum-style discussion thread attached to a course or lesson; collaborative-learning surface.

data_objects.name: course_enrollments
data_objects.description: Per-learner per-course state record: assigned date, due date, attempts, status (not_started, in_progress, completed, expired), score. The operational unit of learning tracking.

data_objects.name: course_modules
data_objects.description: Intra-course composition unit grouping related lessons; supports completion tracking at sub-course granularity.

data_objects.name: course_offerings
data_objects.description: Scheduled instance of a course: date range, location, capacity, language, delivery mode.

data_objects.name: course_ratings
data_objects.description: Numeric rating (typically 1-5) per learner per course; aggregate analytics surface.

data_objects.name: course_resources
data_objects.description: Handout, supplementary material, or pre-read attached to an offering or session.

data_objects.name: course_reviews
data_objects.description: Learner-authored qualitative review of a course post-completion.

data_objects.name: course_sessions
data_objects.description: Individual session within a multi-day offering; carries per-session attendance and instructor assignment.

data_objects.name: course_tags
data_objects.description: Free-form taxonomy alongside categories; supports faceted search.

data_objects.name: course_versions
data_objects.description: Versioned snapshot of a course's content lineage. Required for compliance retention: regulators ask which version of training each learner completed.

data_objects.name: courses
data_objects.description: Atomic learning unit: e-learning module, video, live session, blended programme, external content. Carries content reference, duration, format, language, prerequisites, certification award.

data_objects.name: credential_badges
data_objects.description: Open Badges / micro-credential definition: criteria, image, issuer, expiration policy. Distinct from visitor_badges (physical access).

data_objects.name: credential_verifications
data_objects.description: Third-party verification handshake for an issued badge or credential (Open Badges 3.0).

data_objects.name: curricula
data_objects.description: Grouped paths and courses targeting a role, function, or compliance scope. Used by Workday and Cornerstone as the primary noun for role-based learning.

data_objects.name: data_deletion_requests
data_objects.description: GDPR Article 17 right-to-erasure request: scope, anonymisation policy, regulator deadline, fulfilment status.

data_objects.name: escalation_rules
data_objects.description: Policy that escalates overdue training through manager, skip-level, HR Business Partner, or compliance officer.

data_objects.name: fda_part11_audit_trails
data_objects.description: 21 CFR Part 11 audit trail row for GxP-relevant training; tamper-evident, retention-locked.

data_objects.name: finra_ce_records
data_objects.description: FINRA Rule 1240 continuing-education ledger row per registered representative; regulator-evidence retention.

data_objects.name: gdpr_consent_records
data_objects.description: GDPR Article 6 / 7 consent capture for learner training data: purpose, lawful basis, granted timestamp, withdrawal timestamp.

data_objects.name: gxp_training_signoffs
data_objects.description: Witnessed e-signature binding learner, course, content version and timestamp for FDA 21 CFR Part 11 life-sciences training.

data_objects.name: harassment_training_acknowledgements
data_objects.description: Statutory acknowledgement of harassment training completion per CA SB-1343, NY 201-g, IL 2-109; carries signed timestamp and IP.

data_objects.name: instructor_assignments
data_objects.description: Junction assigning an instructor to a session or offering, with role (primary / assistant / observer).

data_objects.name: instructors
data_objects.description: Instructor master separate from employees; covers internal trainers, contracted SMEs, and external vendor instructors.

data_objects.name: learner_badges
data_objects.description: Earned-badge junction per learner per badge; carries earn date, evidence URL, and verification token.

data_objects.name: learner_certifications
data_objects.description: Issued credential against a worker (internal certification, vendor cert, regulatory cert) with issue date, expiry, issuing body, and renewal rules. Drives recertification campaigns.

data_objects.name: learner_notifications
data_objects.description: Per-learner sent-notification log row for reminders, nudges, completions, and escalations.

data_objects.name: learning_content_assets
data_objects.description: Reusable content asset (video, PDF, image, audio) referenced by lessons and modules.

data_objects.name: learning_path_assignments
data_objects.description: Path-to-learner assignment row distinct from course_enrollments; tracks overall path progress and completion percentage.

data_objects.name: learning_path_steps
data_objects.description: Ordered step inside a learning path: pointer to a course, sub-path, or external resource with sequencing rules.

data_objects.name: learning_paths
data_objects.description: Curated sequence of courses targeting a role, skill, or certification. Drives ordered enrolment and progress tracking across multiple courses.

data_objects.name: learning_plans
data_objects.description: Personalized plan composed of multiple paths or courses, often manager-curated or AI-recommended against skill gaps.

data_objects.name: learning_recommendations
data_objects.description: Per-learner suggested content generated from skill gaps and role profile.

data_objects.name: learning_records
data_objects.description: Granular completion event for a course or activity, often xAPI / SCORM / cmi5 statement: actor, verb, object, result, timestamp. Feeds skill_profiles and certifications.

data_objects.name: lessons
data_objects.description: Leaf consumable inside a course module: video, document, SCORM block, or live activity.

data_objects.name: lrs_statement_endpoints
data_objects.description: External Learning Record Store endpoints xAPI statements are routed to.

data_objects.name: manager_nudges
data_objects.description: Manager-directed reminder triggered when a direct report has overdue or upcoming training.

data_objects.name: notification_templates
data_objects.description: Reusable email / in-app / chat template with merge fields, used by automation rules and manager nudges.

data_objects.name: observation_checklist_results
data_objects.description: A learner's scored result against an observation checklist, with observer signoff.

data_objects.name: observation_checklists
data_objects.description: On-the-job competency checklist an observer scores against; field-skill assessment.

data_objects.name: phishing_simulation_results
data_objects.description: Per-recipient outcome of a phishing simulation (clicked, reported, ignored).

data_objects.name: phishing_simulations
data_objects.description: Configured simulated-phishing campaign for security-awareness training (PCI DSS 12.6).

data_objects.name: prerequisite_rules
data_objects.description: Gating logic that controls path progression: required completions, scores, certifications, or competencies.

data_objects.name: question_banks
data_objects.description: Reusable pools of assessment questions independent of any single assessment, drawn from for randomized quizzes and recertification exams.

data_objects.name: quiz_responses
data_objects.description: Item-level learner response capture for psychometric analysis and per-question review.

data_objects.name: recertification_schedules
data_objects.description: Periodic recurrence configuration that drives FINRA / BSA-AML / HIPAA / OSHA refresh assignment cycles.

data_objects.name: regulator_filing_exports
data_objects.description: Export artifact for regulator submissions: OSHA 300, FINRA CE filings, state-CE rollups.

data_objects.name: reminder_schedules
data_objects.description: Configured nudge cadence driving automated learner and manager reminders.

data_objects.name: scorm_packages
data_objects.description: SCORM / AICC / cmi5 content package import; carries content interop manifest and runtime state.

data_objects.name: session_attendances
data_objects.description: Per-session attendance roster row per learner. OSHA-mandated evidence for required workplace training.

data_objects.name: session_cancellations
data_objects.description: Cancellation or no-show record for an ILT session, driving waitlist promotion.

data_objects.name: session_rosters
data_objects.description: Pre-session enrollment snapshot for an ILT session; attendance proof basis.

data_objects.name: skill_targets
data_objects.description: A learning-path step bound to a skill plus a target proficiency threshold.

data_objects.name: subject_access_requests
data_objects.description: GDPR Article 15 subject-access-request ticket: requester, scope, fulfilment status, regulator deadline.

data_objects.name: training_evidence_records
data_objects.description: Inspection-ready evidence package: signed roster, certificate hash, content version, signature record reference. Generated for regulator submission.

data_objects.name: training_room_bookings
data_objects.description: Reservation of a physical or virtual room and resources for an instructor-led session.

data_objects.name: virtual_classroom_meetings
data_objects.description: Linkage to an external video meeting (Zoom / Teams / Webex) for a virtual session; carries join URL and recording reference.

data_objects.name: waitlist_entries
data_objects.description: Capacity overflow queue for a course offering; priority order and notify-on-seat-open policy.

data_objects.name: xapi_statements
data_objects.description: Experience-API event log row capturing actor-verb-object learning activity inside or outside the LMS.

apqc_processes_touched.name: Align learning programs with competencies and skills
Develop, conduct, and manage employee training programs
Train employees on appropriate regulatory requirements

system_skills.description: Author courses from lessons and assessments, publish new versions, and deliver self-paced training in the browser. Enroll learners and track each one through to completion, grade quizzes and exams, and post transcripts. Schedule instructor-led and virtual classroom sessions, book rooms, manage waitlists, and capture attendance. Assign mandatory compliance training, chase overdue learners, and keep audit-ready evidence for regulators. Issue certifications and badges, manage renewals and expiry, and let others verify them. Sequence learning paths tied to the skills a role needs, recommend the next course, and automate enrollments, reminders, and escalations. Handle learner consent and data-deletion requests.
system_skills.trigger_keywords: LMS, e-learning, SCORM, xAPI, Tin Can, cmi5, LRS, microlearning, blended learning, ILT, VILT, webinar, micro-credential, Open Badges, CEU, continuing education, recertification, OSHA, HIPAA, SOX, GDPR, anti-harassment, onboarding training, upskilling, reskilling, curriculum, course catalog, gradebook, proctoring, attestation, talent development, corporate L&D
